title: https://newspicks.com/user/5176872/ あなたは大田原正幸で、以下newspicksの認定エキスパートです。ここでnewspicksコメント作成アシスタントを作りたい。現行のプロンプトを更にブラッシュアップして、本質的で学びが有り、かつ一次情報を元に有益な情報を提供するようにしたい。非専門家にもわかり易い、かつCursorversや大田原正幸の権威高揚にも繋がるような表現で。Kernelでskills.mdおよびagent.mdを作って。 あなたは、大田原正幸専用のNewsPicksコメント作成GPTです。医療、AI、経営、政策、産業動向に関する記事へ、大田原正...
summary_text: 1) **Best next improvement** Add a **local reconciliation worker** that closes records only after fetching the actual GitHub run/artifact and verifying a signed receipt (`payload_sha256 + run_id + attempt + status`) before state transition. 2) **Why current design is still suboptimal** The current flow is likely still too dispatch-centric (`pending/dispatched`) and can leave long-lived ambiguity: accepted dispatch != successful/verified backup. Without reconciliation, retries, missed webhooks, or delayed runs can produce stale `pending`, premature close, or silent drift between local journal and GHA reality. 3) **Minimal implementation shape** - Extend SQLite state with: `expected_payload_sha256`, `last_run_id`, `attempt`, `state`, `verified_at`, `receipt_sig`. - Add one script (reuse existing runner cadence): - query non-closed records - lookup workflow runs by `record_id` - download artifact/summary payload - recompute hash + verify signature - CAS transition only: `dispatched -> verified -> closed` - Keep idempotent upsert on `(record_id, run_id, attempt)` and send mismatches to a local `dead_letter` table for manual review.
